name: job-board-scout
description: Custom MCP tool: readJobs extracts job listings (title, company, location, url) from any board.

tools.name: readJobs
tools.description: Self-contained: navigates to the given job search/results `url` and extracts job listings (title, url, location, snippet) from the page. Returns a small JSON list of the newest postings.

tools.name: finish
tools.description: Call when the task is complete. Pass a short result summary; its value is the final result.
